description: This tutorial discusses optimistic responsiveness in blockchain protocols, focusing on message delays and transaction confirmations after GST. It highlights the challenges of achieving responsiveness in dynamically available settings and presents a theorem stating that no zero resilient blockchain protocol can be optimistically responsive in such environments.
topic_summary: The video covers the concept of optimistic responsiveness in blockchain protocols, emphasizing the importance of actual message delays over known bounds. It presents a theorem regarding the impossibility of zero resilient protocols being optimistically responsive in dynamically available settings, illustrated through a high-level proof sketch.
